message:
fix: add tooltip hover delay to section references and fix mobile close buttons

Section Reference:
- Add 400ms hover delay before showing tooltip (matches jargon component)
- Prevents accidental tooltip triggers when scrolling past anchors

Jargon & Section Reference:
- Add z-10 to mobile close buttons to ensure they're above scrollable content
- Add type="button" to section-reference close button for consistency
- Improve hover/active states for better touch feedback

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
